stemHtml:
Given the following information, determine the take-off mass CG...

Basic Empty Mass: 2 635 lb and its associated moment: 204 379.5 in.lb
Forward seat passenger: 93 lb and the balance arm: 79 in
Aft seat passenger : 180 lb and the balance arm: 119 in
Block fuel : 830 lb
Taxi fuel: 230 lb
Fuel tank balance arm: 86 in
